name: youtube-watcher
tagline: ClawHub (336★): Fetch and read transcripts from YouTube videos. Use when you need to summarize a video, answer questions about its content,
verdict: Main gap: no defined output -- the skill never says where the result goes or what shape it takes, so you may not know where to find what it produced. Failure handling only covers missing captions; a missing yt-dlp install, an equally likely failure, has no stated fallback. Security is clean.

highlights.summary: No format, location, or shape is defined for either the script's output or the final deliverable — matches the rubric's own fail example almost verbatim.
No 'NOT for'/exclusion language appears anywhere in the file; nothing distinguishes this from non-YouTube video/audio summarization requests.
yt-dlp is a well-known legitimate tool installed via standard Homebrew/pip registries with correct spelling (no typosquat, no registry override), but neither install entry pins a v
